ddls:
CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_name" TEXT /* Name of the game */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Mode of the game (e.g., multiplayer, singleplayer) */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the game */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the game */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game */,
  "server_id" TEXT /* ID of the server where the game is hosted */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the player */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the player */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the player registered */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the player logged in */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the player's account (e.g., active, banned) */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level or rank of the player */,
  "profile_picture" TEXT /* URL of the player's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_state" (
  "player_game_state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game state */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_state_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game state */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player at the current round */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the player (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "action_count" INTEGER /* Number of actions taken by the player in the current game state */,
  "last_action_time" TEXT /* Last time the player took an action */,
  "health" INTEGER /* Health points of the player */,
  "ammo" INTEGER /* Ammunition count of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_state_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_state_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rounds" (
  "round_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each round */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game */,
  "round_num" INTEGER /* Round number */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the round */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the round */,
  "round_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the round */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the round */,
  "round_status" TEXT /* Status of the round (e.g., active, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("round_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actions" (
  "action_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "round_id" INTEGER /* ID of the round */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., move, attack) */,
  "action_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the action */,
  "action_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the action */,
  "action_result" TEXT /* Result of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_round_id FOREIGN KEY ("round_id") REFERENCES rounds ("round_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_actions_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "action_types" (
  "action_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each action type */,
  "action_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the action type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the action type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the action type (e.g., movement, combat) */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points assigned to the action type for scoring purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("action_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_modes" (
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game mode */,
  "game_mode_name" TEXT /* Name of the game mode */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the game mode */,
  "max_players" INTEGER /* Maximum number of players allowed in the game mode */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_mode_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_game_modes" (
  "player_game_mode_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player game mode */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_mode_id" INTEGER /* ID of the game mode */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player in the game mode */,
  "play_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the player has played in the game mode */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_modes_game_mode_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_mode_id") REFERENCES game_modes ("game_mode_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_game_modes_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the score */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level or rank of the player when the score was achieved */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode in which the score was achieved */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leaderboards" (
  "leaderboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each leaderboard */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "score" INTEGER /* Score of the player */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the player */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode of the leaderboard */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the leaderboard was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("leaderboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leaderboards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "achievements" (
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_name" TEXT /* Name of the achievement */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the achievement */,
  "difficulty" TEXT /* Difficulty level of the achievement */,
  "reward" TEXT /* Reward for completing the achievement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_achievements" (
  "player_achievement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player achievement */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "achievement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the achievement */,
  "achievement_date" TEXT /* Date when the player achieved the achievement */,
  "game_version" TEXT /* Version of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_achievement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_achievements_achievement_id FOREIGN KEY ("achievement_id") REFERENCES achievements ("achievement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_settings" (
  "game_setting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game setting */,
  "game_id" TEXT /* ID of the game */,
  "setting_name" TEXT /* Name of the setting */,
  "setting_value" TEXT /* Value of the setting */,
  "game_mode" TEXT /* Game mode to which the setting applies */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the setting (e.g., graphics, sound) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last time the setting was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_setting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_settings_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
